name: read_mem
description: Read len bytes from a flat address. addr is hex (e.g. 3fb5); len<=32. Returns hex.

name: write_mem
description: Write bytes to a flat address. addr is hex; bytes is space-separated hex (7a 65 70).

name: exec
description: Near-call a routine at a flat hex address; reports AX and CF.

name: save_env
description: Save conversation and arena to disk.

name: load_env
description: Restore saved conversation and arena; reboots.
